title: The Public Employment (Requirement as to Residence) Act, 1957
full_text: The Public Employment (Requirement as to Residence) Act, 1957 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195744 Act Number: 44 Enactment Date: 1957-12-07 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Public Employment (Requirement as to Residence) Act, 1957 Long Title: An Act to make in pursuance of clause (3) of article 16 of the Constitution special provisions for requirement as to residence in regard to certain classes of public employment in certain areas and to repeal existing laws prescribing any such requirement. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 21-3-1957 Notification: 21st March, 1957, vide notification No. G.S.R. 2323, dated 21st March, 1959, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Public Employment (Requirement as to Residence) Act, 1957 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Repeal of existing laws prescribing requirements as to residence. Section 3. Power to make rules in respect of certain classes of public employment in certain areas. Section 4. Parliamentary scrutiny of rules. Section 5. Duration of section 3 and rules.
